before_fix.problem: Global variable _active_db_name shared across all requests
before_fix.impact: User A login to ocb_titan, User B login to ocb_unt_1, both affected by last switch

after_fix.solution: Using Python contextvars for per-request database isolation
implementation: middleware/tenant_isolation.py: Sets context from JWT token
auth.py: Stores tenant_id in JWT token on login
utils/auth.py: get_current_user() sets context from token
after_fix.flow: Request -> Middleware extracts tenant_id from JWT -> Sets ContextVar -> All DB operations use correct tenant
